blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,131 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
